arabic: رَبَّنَا آتِنَا فِي الدُّنْيَا حَسَنَةً وَفِي الآخِرَةِ حَسَنَةً وَقِنَا عَذَابَ النَّارِ
english: Our Lord, give us in this world that which is good and in the Hereafter that which is good, and protect us from the punishment of the Fire
translation: Rabbana atina fid-dunya hasanatan wa fil-akhirati hasanatan wa qina adhab an-nar

arabic: رَّبِّ اغْفِرْ لِي وَلِوَالِدَيَّ وَلِمَن دَخَلَ بَيْتِيَ مُؤْمِنًا
english: My Lord, forgive me and my parents and whoever enters my house as a believer
translation: Rabbi ighfir li wa li-waliday wa li-man dakhala bayti mu'minan

arabic: رَبِّ اشْرَحْ لِي صَدْرِي وَيَسِّرْ لِي أَمْرِي وَاحْلُلْ عُقْدَةً مّن لِّسَانِي
english: My Lord, expand for me my chest and ease for me my task and untie the knot from my tongue
translation: Rabbi sharrah li sadri wa yassir li amri wahlul uqdah min lisani

arabic: رَبَّنَا لَا تُؤَاخِذْنَا إِن نَّسِينَا أَوْ أَخْطَأْنَا
english: Our Lord, do not impose blame upon us if we have forgotten or erred
translation: Rabbana la tu'akhidhna in nasina aw akhta'na

arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ عَذَابِ جَهَنَّمَ
english: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from the punishment of Hell
translation: Allahumma inni a'udhu bika min adhab jahannam

arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ الْعَافِيَةَ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالآخِرَةِ
english: O Allah, I ask You for well-being in this world and the Hereafter
translation: Allahumma inni as'aluka al-'afiyah fid-dunya wa al-akhirah

arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اجْعَلْ أَحَاسِنَ أَعْمَالِنَا خَوَاتِيمَهَا
english: O Allah, make the best of our deeds their endings
translation: Allahumma ij'al ahasana a'malina khatimaha

arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ اللَّهُمَّ وَبِحَمْدِكَ أَشْهَدُ أَن لَّا إِلَـٰهَ إِلَّا أَنتَ أَسْتَغْفِرُكَ وَأَتُوبُ إِلَيْكَ
english: Glory be to You O Allah and praise be to You. I bear witness that there is no god but You. I seek Your forgiveness and repent to You
translation: Subhanaka Allahumma wa bihamdika ash-hadu an la ilaha illa anta astaghfiruka wa atubu ilayk

arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أُحِبُّكَ فَاغْفِرْ لِي
english: O Allah, I love You, so forgive me
translation: Allahumma inni uhibbuka faghfir li

arabic: يَا رَبِّ بِرَحْمَتِكَ أَسْتَغِيثُ فَأَغِثْنِي
english: O my Lord, by Your mercy I seek help, so help me
translation: Ya rabbi birahmatika astagheeth fa aghithni

arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اغْفِرْ لَنَا ذُنُوبَنَا وَإِسْرَافَنَا فِي أَمْرِنَا
english: O Allah, forgive us our sins and our excesses in our affairs
translation: Allahumma ighfir lana dhunubana wa israfana fi amrina

arabic: رَبِّ قَد آتَيْتَنِي مِنَ الْمُلْكِ وَعَلَّمْتَنِي مِن تَأْوِيلِ الأَحَادِيثِ
english: My Lord, You have given me dominion and taught me the interpretation of events
translation: Rabbi qad ataytani min al-mulk wa allamtani min ta'wil al-ahadith

arabic: لَا إِلَـٰهَ إِلَّا أَنتَ سُبْحَانَكَ إِنِّي كُنتُ مِنَ الظَّالِمِينَ
english: There is no god but You. Glory be to You. Indeed, I was of the wrongdoers
translation: La ilaha illa anta subhanaka inni kuntu min ad-dhalimin

arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْخَوْفِ وَالْجُوعِ وَذَهَابِ الْمَالِ
english: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from fear, hunger, and loss of wealth
translation: Allahumma inni a'udhu bika min al-khawf wa al-ju' wa dhahab al-mal

arabic: يَا حَيُّ يَا قَيُّومُ بِرَحْمَتِكَ أَسْتَغِيثُ
english: O Ever-Living, O Self-Subsisting and Sustaining, by Your mercy I seek help
translation: Ya hayy ya qayyum birahmatika astagheeth

arabic: اللَّهُمَّ أَصْلِحْ لِي دِينِي الَّذِي هُوَ عِصْمَةُ أَمْرِي
english: O Allah, set right for me my faith which is the guardian of my affairs
translation: Allahumma aslih li dini alladhi huwa ismat amri

arabic: رَبَّنَا تَقَبَّل مِنَّا إِنَّكَ أَنتَ السَّمِيعُ الْعَلِيمُ
english: Our Lord, accept from us. Indeed, You are the Hearing, the Knowing
translation: Rabbana taqabbal minna innaka anta as-sami' al-'alim

arabic: حَسْبُنَا اللَّهُ وَنِعْمَ الْوَكِيلُ
english: Allah is sufficient for us, and He is the best disposer of affairs
translation: Hasbun Allah wa ni'am al-wakil

arabic: اللَّهُمَّ بِعِلْمِكَ الْغَيْبَ وَقُدْرَتِكَ عَلَىٰ الْخَلْقِ أَحْيِنِي مَا كَانَتِ الْحَيَاةُ خَيْرًا لِي
english: O Allah, by Your knowledge of the unseen and Your power over creation, keep me alive as long as life is good for me
translation: Allahumma bi'ilmika al-ghayb wa qudratika 'ala al-khalq ahyini ma kanat al-hayah khayran li

arabic: اللَّهُمَّ ذَا السَّلْطَانِ الْعَظِيمِ وَذَا الْمَنِّ الْكَرِيمِ
english: O Allah, Possessor of great authority and of generous favor
translation: Allahumma dha as-sultan al-'adhim wa dha al-mann al-karim

arabic: اللَّهُمَّ رَبَّ السَّمَوَاتِ وَرَبَّ الْأَرْضِ وَرَبَّ الْعَرْشِ الْعَظِيمِ
english: O Allah, Lord of the heavens and Lord of the earth and Lord of the Mighty Throne
translation: Allahumma rabba as-samawat wa rabba al-ardh wa rabba al-'arsh al-'adhim

arabic: اللَّهُمَّ هَبْ لَنَا مِنْ لَدُنْكَ رَحْمَةً
english: O Allah, grant us mercy from Your presence
translation: Allahumma hab lana min ladunka rahmah

arabic: رَبِّ إِنِّي لِمَا أَنزَلْتَ إِلَيَّ مِنْ خَيْرٍ فَقِيرٌ
english: My Lord, indeed I am in need of whatever good You send down to me
translation: Rabbi inni lima anzalta ilayya min khayrin faqir

arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنَّا نَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ خَيْرِ مَا سَأَلَكَ نَبِيُّكَ مُحَمَّدٌ
english: O Allah, we ask You for the good that Your Prophet Muhammad asked You for
translation: Allahumma inna nas'aluka min khayri ma sa'alaka nabiyyuk Muhammad

arabic: رَبِّ اجْعَل لِي آيَةً وَلَا تَذَرْنِي فِي الْأَرْضِ فَرْدًا
english: My Lord, make a sign for me and do not leave me alone in the land
translation: Rabbi ij'al li ayah wa la tadharna fil-ardh farda

arabic: يَا حَنَّانُ يَا مَنَّانُ يَا ذَا الْجَلَالِ وَالْإِكْرَامِ
english: O Most Compassionate, O Most Gracious, O Lord of Majesty and Honor
translation: Ya hannan ya mannan ya dha al-jalal wa al-ikram

arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْهَمِّ وَالْحَزَنِ
english: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from worry and sadness
translation: Allahumma inni a'udhu bika min al-hamm wa al-hazan

arabic: رَبَّنَا وَآتِنَا مَا وَعَدتَّنَا عَلَىٰ رُسُلِكَ وَلَا تُخْزِنَا يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ
english: Our Lord, and give us what You have promised through Your messengers and do not disgrace us on the Day of Resurrection
translation: Rabbana wa atina ma wa'attana 'ala rusulika wa la tukhzina yawm al-qiyamah

arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اغْفِرْ لِي فِرْدَةً وَاجْعَلْ لِي إِمَامًا لِلْمُتَّقِينَ
english: O Allah, forgive me completely and make me a leader for the righteous
translation: Allahumma ighfir li firdah wa ij'al li imam al-muttaqin

arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ حُبَّكَ وَحُبَّ مَنْ يُحِبُّكَ
english: O Allah, I ask You for Your love and the love of those who love You
translation: Allahumma inni as'aluka hubbak wa hubba man yuhibbuk

arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
english: O Allah, send blessings upon Muhammad and the family of Muhammad
translation: Allahumma salli 'ala Muhammad wa al Muhammad

arabic: رَبِّ الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ حَمْدًا يُوَافِي نِعَمَهُ
english: My Lord, all praise is for Allah, praise that matches His blessings
translation: Rabbi al-hamdu lillahi hamdan yuwafi ni'amah

arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ التَّوْبَةَ وَالْعَفَاءَ
english: O Allah, I ask You for repentance and forgiveness
translation: Allahumma inni as'aluka at-tawbah wa al-'afah

arabic: رَبِّ اغْفِرْ وَارْحَمْ وَأَنتَ خَيْرُ الرَّاحِمِينَ
english: My Lord, forgive and have mercy, for You are the best of those who show mercy
translation: Rabbi ighfir wa arham wa anta khayru ar-rahimin

arabic: إِنَّا لِلَّهِ وَإِنَّا إِلَيْهِ رَاجِعُونَ
english: Indeed we belong to Allah, and indeed to Him we will return
translation: Inna lillahi wa inna ilayhi raji'un

arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اِجْعَلْ دَخْلِي فِي رِزْقٍ وَخَرْجِي وَفِي تَقْوًى
english: O Allah, make my income from lawful means and my spending in piety
translation: Allahumma ij'al dakhli fi rizq wa kharji wa fi taqwa

arabic: لَا حَوْلَ وَلَا قُوَّةَ إِلَّا بِاللَّهِ الْعَلِيِّ الْعَظِيمِ
english: There is no might or power except with Allah, the Most High, the Most Great
translation: La hawla wa la quwwata illa billah al-'aliy al-'adhim

arabic: اللَّهُمَّ أَغِنِنِي بِحِلِّكَ عَن حَرَامِكَ وَبِطَاعَتِكَ عَن مَعْصِيَتِكَ
english: O Allah, make me independent through Your lawful means from Your unlawful, and obedient to You through avoiding Your disobedience
translation: Allahumma aghnini bihallik 'an haramik wa bi ta'atik 'an ma'siyatik

arabic: رَبِّ زِدْنِي عِلْمًا
english: My Lord, increase me in knowledge
translation: Rabbi zidni 'ilma

arabic: اللَّهُمَّ أَعِنِّي عَلَىٰ ذِكْرِكَ وَشُكْرِكَ وَحُسْنِ عِبَادَتِكَ
english: O Allah, help me in remembering You, thanking You, and worshipping You well
translation: Allahumma a'inni 'ala dhikrk wa shukrk wa husn ibadatk

arabic: يَا اللَّهُ يَا رَحِيمُ يَا كَرِيمُ
english: O Allah, O the Most Merciful, O the Most Generous
translation: Ya Allah ya Raheem ya Kareem

arabic: رَبِّ أَلْهِمْنِي رُشْدِي وَقِنِي شَرَّ نَفْسِي
english: My Lord, inspire me with guidance and protect me from the evil of my soul
translation: Rabbi ilhamni rushdi wa qini sharr nafsi

arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنَّا نَسْأَلُكَ رِضَاكَ وَالْجَنَّةَ
english: O Allah, we ask You for Your pleasure and paradise
translation: Allahumma inna nas'aluka ridak wa al-jannah

arabic: رَبَّنَا اغْفِرْ لَنَا وَلِإِخْوَانِنَا الَّذِينَ سَبَقُونَا بِالْإِيمَانِ
english: Our Lord, forgive us and our brothers who preceded us in faith
translation: Rabbana ighfir lana wa li-ikhwanina alladhina sabaquna bil-iman

arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ غَضَبِكَ وَمِنْ غِضَبِ نَبِيِّكَ
english: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from Your anger and the anger of Your Prophet
translation: Allahumma inni a'udhu bika min ghaddabik wa min ghaddab nabiyyik

arabic: لَا إِلَـٰهَ إِلَّا أَنتَ وَحْدَكَ لَا شَرِيكَ فِي الْمُلْكِ
english: There is no god but You alone, no partner in the kingdom
translation: La ilaha illa anta wahdak la sharika fil-mulk

arabic: اللَّهُمَّ افْتَح لَنّا أَبْوَاب رَحْمَتِكَ
english: O Allah, open for us the gates of Your mercy
translation: Allahumma iftah lana abwab rahmatik

arabic: رَبِّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ أَنْ أَدْعُوَكَ بِغَيْرِ عِلْمٍ
english: My Lord, I seek refuge in You from calling You with no knowledge
translation: Rabbi inni a'udhu bika an ad'uka bighayri 'ilm

arabic: اللَّهُمَّ كَمَا حَفِظْتَ الْقُرْآنَ احْفَظْ لِي دِينِي
english: O Allah, as You preserved the Quran, preserve my faith for me
translation: Allahumma kama hafazt al-Quran ihfadh li dini

arabic: يَا ذَا الْجَلَالِ وَالْإِكْرَامِ يَا ذَا النِّعَمِ الَّتِي لَا تُحْصَىٰ
english: O Lord of Majesty and Honor, O One with blessings that cannot be counted
translation: Ya dha al-jalal wa al-ikram ya dha an-ni'am allati la tuhsa

arabic: اللَّهُمَّ أَسْلَمْتُ نَفْسِي إِلَيْكَ وَفَوَّضْتُ أَمْرِي إِلَيْكَ
english: O Allah, I have submitted myself to You and entrusted my affairs to You
translation: Allahumma aslamtu nafsi ilayk wa fawwadtu amri ilayk

arabic: رَبِّ لَا تَذَرْنِي فَرْدًا وَأَنتَ خَيْرُ الْوَارِثِينَ
english: My Lord, do not leave me alone, for You are the best of inheritors
translation: Rabbi la tadharna farda wa anta khayru al-waritheen

arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ حَسْنَةً فِي الدُّنْيَا وَحَسْنَةً فِي الآخِرَةِ
english: O Allah, I ask You for goodness in this world and goodness in the Hereafter
translation: Allahumma inni as'aluka hasanatan fid-dunya wa hasanatan fil-akhirah

arabic: يَا كَافِي يَا حَافِي يَا شَافِي يَا وَافِي
english: O Sufficient One, O Protector, O Healer, O Fulfiller
translation: Ya Kafi ya Hafi ya Shafi ya Wafi

arabic: رَبَّنَا إِنَّا آمَنَّا فَاغْفِرْ لَنَا ذُنُوبَنَا
english: Our Lord, indeed we have believed, so forgive us our sins
translation: Rabbana inna amanna faghfir lana dhunubana

arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَبِّرْ قَلْبِي وَأَصْلِحْ حَالِي وَاغْفِرْ ذَنْبِي
english: O Allah, strengthen my heart, improve my condition, and forgive my sin
translation: Allahumma sabbir qalbi wa aslih hali wa aghfir dhanbi

arabic: دَعَاءُ ذُو النُّونِ إِذ نَادَىٰ فِي الظُّلُمَاتِ أَن لَّا إِلَـٰهَ إِلَّا أَنتَ
english: The invocation of Dhun-Nun when he called from the darkness: There is no god but You
translation: Du'a dhu an-nun idh nada fil-zhulumat an la ilaha illa anta

arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اجْعَلْنَا مِنْ الَّذِينَ إِذَا أَحْسَنُوا اسْتَبْشَرُوا وَإِذَا أَسَاءُوا اسْتَغْفَرُوا
english: O Allah, make us of those who, when they do good, rejoice, and when they do wrong, seek forgiveness
translation: Allahumma ij'alna min alladhina idha ahsanu istabasharuwao idha asau istaghafruwao

arabic: سَلَامٌ عَلَيْنَا وَعَلَىٰ عِبَادِ اللَّهِ الصَّالِحِينَ
english: Peace be upon us and upon the righteous servants of Allah
translation: Salamun alayna wa ala ibad Allah as-salihin

arabic: وَالْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ رَبِّ الْعَالَمِينَ
english: And all praise is for Allah, Lord of the worlds
translation: Wa al-hamdu lillahi rabbi al-'alamin
